src/test/java/org/alfresco/api/YamlToJso.general_idea: Add constants for the SCIM V2 YAML definition path, JSON output path, and API title.
Extend the main method to parse the SCIM V2 YAML definition and write it as a JSON file.

src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.general_idea: Update the expected count of API definitions in the integration test to reflect the addition of new API specifications.
src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.human_impl: assertEquals("8 definitions in 2 formats should be 16.", 16, definitions.size());

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler properties to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.
Upgrade the swagger-ui dependency version from 3.38.0 to 4.1.3.
Upgrade the commons-io test dependency from 2.8.0 to 2.14.0.

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Define the target Java version as 21 in the workflow environment variables.
Update the release and development version strings to reflect the new project versioning scheme.
Upgrade the pre-commit GitHub Action to a newer version compatible with the current toolchain.
Upgrade the actions/checkout GitHub Action to version 4.
Upgrade the get-build-info GitHub Action to a newer version.
Configure the setup-java-build action to explicitly use Java 21 for build, test, and publish jobs.
Upgrade the configure-git-author GitHub Action to a newer version.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add jobId parameter definition for asynchronous job tracking.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
parameters:
  jobIdParam:
    name: jobId
    in: path
    description: The identifier of a job.
    required: true
    type: string

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add hasSubgroups and description to group fields parameter.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
description: |
      Returns additional information about the group. The following optional fields can be requested:
      * parentIds
      * zones
      * hasSubgroups
      * description

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add allowableOperations to favorites fields parameter.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
description: |
      Returns additional information about favorites, the following optional fields can be requested:
      * path (note, this only applies to files and folders)
      * properties
      * allowableOperations

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Escape angle brackets in special characters description for valid Markdown.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
-            The name must not contain spaces or the following special characters: * " < > \ / ? : and |.
+            The name must not contain spaces or the following special characters: * " `<` `>` \ / ? : and |.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add POST endpoint to initiate asynchronous node size calculation.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
'/nodes/{nodeId}/size-details':
    post:
      tags:
        - nodes
      summary: Accepts request to generate Node Size Details
      operationId: getNodeSizeDetailsRequest

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add GET endpoint to retrieve results of asynchronous node size calculation.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
'/nodes/{nodeId}/size-details/{jobId}':
    get:
      tags:
        - nodes
      summary: Get the result of a background job to get the size of a node.
      operationId: getNodeSizeDetails

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add skipCount and maxItems parameters to secondary children endpoints.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add PUT endpoint to update a user preference.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
put:
      tags:
        - preferences
      summary: Update a preference
      operationId: updatePreference

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add POST endpoint to deauthorize a user.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
'/people/{personId}/deauthorize':
    post:
      x-alfresco-since: "25.x"
      tags:
        - people
      summary: Deauthorize the user
      operationId: deauthorizeUser

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add POST endpoint to generate reauthorization code.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
'/people/{personId}/reauthorization-code':
    post:
      x-alfresco-since: "25.x"
      tags:
        - people
      summary: Generate the reauthorization code for the user
      operationId: reauthorizationCode

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add POST endpoint to reauthorize a user.

'/people/{personId}/reauthorize':
    post:
      x-alfresco-since: "25.x"
      tags:
        - people
      summary: Reauthorize the user
      operationId: reauthorizeUser

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add PreferenceBodyUpdate schema for updating preferences.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
PreferenceBodyUpdate:
    type: object
    required:
      - id
    properties:
      id:
        type: string
        description: The unique id of the preference
      value:
        type: string
        description: The value of the preference. Note that this can be of any JSON type.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add getNodeSizeDetailsResponse schema for size calculation results.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
getNodeSizeDetailsResponse:
    type: object
    properties:
      id:
        type: string
        description: Provides the nodeId for which POST/size-details has been initiated.
      sizeInBytes:
        type: string
        description: The folder size in bytes.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add sizeDetailsRequestResultEntry and sizeDetailsRequestExecResult schemas.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
sizeDetailsRequestResultEntry:
    type: object
    required:
      - entry
    properties:
      entry:
        $ref: '#/definitions/sizeDetailsRequestExecResult'
  sizeDetailsRequestExecResult:
    type: object
    required:
      - jobId
    properties:
      jobId:
        type: string
        description: The unique identifier of the size details execution request

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add AuthCodeEntry, AuthCode, and AuthKey schemas for reauthorization.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl:
AuthCodeEntry:
    type: object
    required:
      - entry
    properties:
      entry:
        $ref: '#/definitions/AuthCode'
  AuthCode:
    type: object
    required:
      - authorizationCode
    properties:
      authorizationCode:
        type: string
  AuthKey:
    description: The encrypted authorization key received from the Alfresco Support.
    type: object
    required:
      - authorizationKey
    properties:
      authorizationKey:
        description: The Base64 encoded authorization key.
        type: string
